title: Opening for Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
